creator: john@nlc.net.au
text:
Included is a new copy of the /usr/ports/graphics/fxtv
directory. Changes to the files Makefile, distinfo and
several patches in the file directory. 2 patch files
have been removed as well.

Fix: To apply, delete the /usr/port/graphics/fxtv directory.
Then uudecode and then extract this archive while in the
/usr/port/graphics directory. Don't apply over the top of
the original files because 2 patch files have to be
removed (patch-aa and patch-ad).
